title: Lucid misses Wall Street expectations, narrows production guidance
text: Lucid missed Wall Street expectations in Q3 2025 and narrowed production guidance for the second consecutive quarter. The company reduced full-year 2025 guidance to approximately 18,000 vehicles from previous 18,000-20,000 range. Softening EV demand and increased competition cited as reasons for guidance cuts. The narrowed guidance reflected management's cautious stance on market conditions and production challenges.
